channel.title: GitHub GDScript Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of GDScript in GitHub

item.title: the-mirror-gdp/the-mirror
item.description: The open-source Roblox & UEFN alternative giving you freedom to own what you create. An all-in-one, real-time, collaborative game development platform built on Godot.

item.title: face-hh/griddycode
item.description: A code editor made with Godot. Code has never been more lit!

item.title: dialogic-godot/dialogic
item.description: 💬 Create Dialogs, Visual Novels, RPGs, and manage Characters with Godot to create your Game!

item.title: BenjaTK/Gaea
item.description: Procedural generation add-on for Godot 4.

item.title: viniciusgerevini/godot-goap
item.description: Goal Oriented Action Planning example in Godot

item.title: KoBeWi/Metroidvania-System
item.description: General-purpose framework for creating metroidvania games in Godot.

item.title: RodZill4/material-maker
item.description: A procedural textures authoring and 3D model painting tool based on the Godot game engine

item.title: nathanhoad/godot_dialogue_manager
item.description: A powerful nonlinear dialogue system for Godot

item.title: HungryProton/scatter
item.description: Godot engine addon to randomly fill an area with props or other scenes

item.title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
item.description: A free & open-source 2D sprite editor, made with the Godot Engine! Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!

item.title: mbrlabs/Lorien
item.description: Infinite canvas drawing/whiteboarding app for Windows, Linux and macOS. Made with Godot.

item.title: ramokz/phantom-camera
item.description: 👻🎥 Control the movement and dynamically tween 2D & 3D cameras. Built for Godot 4. Inspired by Cinemachine.

item.title: MrEliptik/game_launcher
item.description: A simple game launcher made with Godot for developers to showcase their games

item.title: Phazorknight/Cogito
item.description: Immersive Sim Template Project for GODOT 4

item.title: nezvers/Godot-GameTemplate
item.description: Template with all necessary stuff taken care, just create your games main features.

item.title: viniciusgerevini/godot-aseprite-wizard
item.description: Godot Editor plugin to help import Aseprite animations to AnimationPlayers, AnimatedSprites and SpriteFrames.

item.title: MewPurPur/GodSVG
item.description: An application in early development for creating simple vector graphics. Built in Godot.

item.title: Alexofp/BDCC
item.description: Text based game about being a prisoner in a space prison with a lot of adult themes. Working title is Broken Dreams Correctional Center or BDCC for short. Test the latest version here: (could be unstable)

item.title: godotengine/godot-demo-projects
item.description: Demonstration and Template Projects

item.title: gdquest-demos/godot-open-rpg
item.description: Learn to create turn-based combat with this Open Source RPG demo ⚔

item.title: rsubtil/controller_icons
item.description: Automatic keyboard/mouse/controller icons and remapper for Godot.
